description: Variance and Conditional Use Permit Processing — manages applications for zoning variances, conditional/special use permits, and administrative adjustments

hard_stops.label: Public Notice Not Published
hard_stops.logic: Required public notice for hearing has not been published within the statutory notice period — hearing cannot proceed

hard_stops.label: Adjacent Property Owners Not Notified
hard_stops.logic: Property owners within the required notification radius have not been sent notice — due process requirement not met

hard_stops.label: Hardship Not Self-Created
hard_stops.logic: Variance findings require that the hardship was not self-created by the applicant — self-created hardship cannot be basis for variance

soft_flags.label: Neighborhood Opposition
soft_flags.logic: Three or more written objections received from adjacent property owners — board should consider community impact
